scenario: Happy path — complete info, single truck, clear format
subject: Quote Request — Flatbed Dallas to Atlanta
body:
Hi Jillian,

We need a rate on the following:

Origin: Dallas, TX
Destination: Atlanta, GA
Equipment: Flatbed
Trucks needed: 1
Commodity: Steel coils
Weight: 42,000 lbs
Pickup: April 15, 2026
Delivery: April 17, 2026
Special requirements: Tarping required

Please send your best rate when you can.

Thanks,
Tom Reynolds
Acme Logistics
(214) 555-0142
